headline: VoiceToWebsite is the AI system manager that turns briefs into pages, offers, and revenue-ready execution
subheadline: Use one operating system to publish structured pages, route buyers into self-serve checkout or guided implementation, and keep every lead, payment, and release observable.

heroPanel.heading: One brand, three ways to close revenue.
heroPanel.body: VoiceToWebsite performs best when it sells software, implementation, and enterprise rollout from the same operating system. The public site should make each lane obvious and easy to trust.

points.label: Operator OS
points.value: Checkout-first software for teams ready to move now.

points.label: Launch Sprint
points.value: Lead-form-first implementation for buyers who need guided setup.

points.label: Enterprise
points.value: Qualification-first rollout for governance, hosting, and custom scope.

workflowHeadline: A strong revenue funnel should feel simple to the buyer and deeply structured underneath.

workflowSteps.title: Clarify the brief
workflowSteps.description: A founder, team, or agency explains the site, launch, or workflow outcome they need in plain language.

workflowSteps.title: Route the buying lane
workflowSteps.description: VoiceToWebsite pushes the buyer toward the right path: checkout for software, implementation brief for services, or qualification for enterprise.

workflowSteps.title: Execute with proof
workflowSteps.description: The system records leads, payments, and execution-ready work in one place so the trust story comes from the product, not from invented claims.

buyerPathsIntro: Every buyer should see a next step that matches how they actually want to buy.

buyerPaths.title: Buy Operator OS
buyerPaths.description: For founders and teams who already understand the value and want the recurring software offer immediately.

buyerPaths.title: Start Launch Sprint
buyerPaths.description: For buyers who want help with positioning, setup, pages, and delivery structure before they self-serve.
buyerPaths.outcome: Best path for implementation revenue and faster customer success.

buyerPaths.title: Qualify Enterprise
buyerPaths.description: For teams that need hosting, governance, rollout planning, and operational review before a commercial commitment.
buyerPaths.outcome: Best path for larger and longer-lived deals.

audienceIntro: The public site now speaks directly to the most valuable buyers instead of trying to appeal to everyone.

audiences.title: Solo founders
audiences.description: Ship more without hiring a full team too early.
bullets: Generate landing pages and offer pages faster
Organize work across product, content, and launch tasks
Create a practical path from idea to revenue

audiences.title: Small agencies
audiences.description: Productize delivery and make execution less dependent on manual coordination.
bullets: Turn prompts into repeatable operating procedures
Sell setup, automation, and retained management

audiences.title: Technical teams
audiences.description: Manage approvals, deployable assets, and automation from one system.
bullets: Keep repo-based control over generated work
Reduce bottlenecks across operations and release workflows

proofHeadline: Proof comes from the running system, not from borrowed authority.
whyNowHeadline: Why buyers move now instead of waiting

whyNowCards.title: Replace scattered tools with one operator layer
whyNowCards.description: Buyers move when the alternative is more manual coordination, slower launches, and weaker follow-through.
whyNowCards.outcome: VoiceToWebsite centralizes pages, offers, lead capture, and execution.

whyNowCards.title: Choose a lane that matches how the buyer wants to buy
whyNowCards.description: Checkout-first software and lead-form-first services reduce confusion and keep more intent alive.
whyNowCards.outcome: The funnel stops treating every buyer the same way.

whyNowCards.title: Use real runtime proof instead of decorative hype
whyNowCards.description: The strongest close comes from observable capability: live offers, lead routing, payment readiness, and admin visibility.
whyNowCards.outcome: The site feels more credible because it is backed by the actual system.

founderStory.heading: This trust layer is built around shipped capability, not invented client stories.
founderStory.body: VoiceToWebsite should earn trust by showing what the system can already do: structured content, live offer routing, repo-backed edits, lead capture, admin visibility, and payment readiness when configured.
points: Real content and offer management inside the repo
Real lead and payment records inside the admin system
Real runtime proof from the product and deployment surfaces

productsIntro: These are the clearest monetization paths for the current product and market position.
objectionHeadline: Objections the site should answer before the buyer leaves

objections.question: What if I do not want another generic AI tool?
objections.answer: That is exactly the point of the positioning shift. VoiceToWebsite is being sold as an AI system manager for execution and revenue, not as a novelty wrapper.

objections.question: What if I need help before I can use the product well?
objections.answer: That is why Launch Sprint exists. The service lane shortens time to value and supports buyers who are not best served by pure self-serve onboarding.

objections.question: What if I need more control, approval, or hosting certainty?
objections.answer: That is the role of the enterprise lane. Governance and rollout should be qualified before commercial commitment, not hidden behind a generic checkout.

faqHeadline: Questions that matter before a buyer commits

faq.question: Is this a website builder or an operations platform?
faq.answer: It is best positioned as an AI system manager that can also generate and manage website assets. That creates a stronger business and a more differentiated offer.

faq.question: How does the site make money early?
faq.answer: Early revenue should come from launch sprints and implementation packages, with software subscriptions growing as the platform becomes more productized.

faq.question: Who is the best first customer?
faq.answer: The best first customers are founders, agencies, and technical operators who already understand the value of automation and are willing to pay for speed.

finalCta.heading: Move into checkout if you are ready to buy, or submit an implementation brief if you want a guided path.
finalCta.body: The funnel works best when Operator OS closes fast, Launch Sprint qualifies serious implementation buyers, and Enterprise gets the review it needs before commercial scope is set.
